MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-04-2010 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders the balance of this case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (212)

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-04-2010 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-14-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2010 Off Calendar

Ntc And Motion To Vacate Order To Arbitrate
Off Calendar Jul-30-2010 Set For Trial On Dec-20-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: Defendants Lauren Brant, Theodore Olson's Motion to Vacate Order to Arbitrate is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is removed from Judicial Arbitration. Order signed. Court ordered case scheduled for Jury Trial on 12/20/2010 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206. Court scheduled a Mediation Order to Show Cause on 10/13/2010 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Court to give notice of the Trial Date. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Response To Economic Litigation Form Interrogatories, And Demand For Inspection;
Off Calendar May-24-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, DEFENDANT LAUREN BRANT's Motion To Compel Response To Economic Litigation Form Interrogatories, And Demand For Inspection, is taken off calendar, at the request of the moving party. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
